projects.name: GenAI Data Assistant (RAG)
projects.description: A RAG chatbot for natural-language queries over structured datasets — chunking, embeddings, and ChromaDB semantic retrieval, with grounding and hallucination checks (in-scope vs. out-of-scope) for source-backed answers. Deployed as a Streamlit app so non-technical users can query data without writing code.

projects.name: Sales & Revenue Trend Analysis
projects.description: A Python ETL pipeline that ingests, cleans, and standardizes retail sales across 3 product categories into SQL, then forecasts monthly revenue and seasonal patterns with Facebook Prophet. Results feed a drill-through Power BI report by category, region, and time period for non-technical stakeholders.

projects.name: Customer Churn Prediction Dashboard
projects.description: Extracted and cleaned a 7,000-row telecom dataset with Python and SQL, ran EDA to surface churn drivers, and trained a logistic-regression model (~80% accuracy, 0.85 ROC-AUC). A Tableau dashboard visualizes churn risk by demographics, contract type, and tenure — turning model output into an actionable tool for business teams.
